items.name: Project Manager AI
items.description: Manages process, stages, backlog discipline, MVP focus, blockers and risks.
items.boundary: Does not write code or add product scope.

items.name: Product Owner AI
items.description: Defines product value, target audience, user problem, MVP, success criteria and what is outside the first version.

items.name: Business Analyst AI
items.description: Transforms product vision into requirements, user roles, scenarios, user stories, acceptance criteria and open questions.

items.name: System Architect AI
items.description: Designs stack, modules, project structure, database, API, security approach and technical risks.

items.name: UX/UI Designer AI
items.description: Describes screens, user flows, UI elements, states and user-facing messages.

items.name: Backend Developer AI
items.description: Implements backend tasks from the backlog using PRD, architecture and API documentation.
items.boundary: Does not change scope or architecture without approval.

items.name: Frontend Developer AI
items.description: Implements frontend tasks from the backlog using UX, PRD and API documentation.
items.boundary: Does not invent new UX or product features.

items.name: QA Engineer AI
items.description: Creates and executes checks for positive scenarios, negative scenarios, edge cases and acceptance criteria.

items.name: Code Reviewer AI
items.description: Reviews code quality, task compliance, architecture compliance, security, performance, readability and error handling.

items.name: DevOps Engineer AI
items.description: Prepares local and deployment environments, Docker, environment variables, CI/CD, logs and backup strategy.

items.name: Technical Writer AI
items.description: Maintains README, setup instructions, project structure documentation, changelog and onboarding documentation.

items.name: AI System Maintainer
items.description: Improves the AI Development System itself through controlled change proposals, versioning and changelog updates.
